1.titleCN: VLM效率 - 图像编码延迟 (ms)
1.descCN: 单张图像在前向传播时的编码延迟（毫秒），测量 VLM 视觉编码器的效率。SigLIP 通过 Sigmoid pairwise ranking loss 在保持高精度的同时比标准 CLIP 快约 1.6 倍。EVA-CLIP ViT-G 参数量最大（1B+），延迟最高但精度也最好。DeCLIP 通过数据高效策略降低了延迟。
1.descEN: Image encoding latency in milliseconds for one forward pass. Measures VLM vision encoder efficiency. SigLIP with sigmoid pairwise ranking loss is ~1.6x faster than standard CLIP while maintaining accuracy. EVA-CLIP ViT-G (1B+ params) has highest latency but best accuracy.
1.source: CLIP paper (Radford et al., 2021), EVA-CLIP (Sun et al., 2023), SigLIP (Zhai et al., 2023)

2.titleCN: 多模态推理 - VQA准确率 (VQA-v2 %)
2.descCN: VQA-v2 测试集准确率，是最重要的多模态推理 benchmark 之一。模型需要根据图像内容回答自然语言问题。InternVL (26B) 以 83.2% 的精度领先，LLaVA-1.6 (7B) 通过动态高分辨率和多模态指令微调达到 79.8%。MiniGPT-4 最低（65.2%）因为它采用简单的线性投影层连接视觉编码器和语言模型。
2.descEN: VQA-v2 accuracy — the model answers natural language questions about images. InternVL (26B) leads at 83.2%. LLaVA-1.6 (7B) reaches 79.8% via dynamic high-resolution and multimodal instruction tuning. MiniGPT-4 is lowest (65.2%) due to its simple linear projection layer.
2.source: LLaVA (Liu et al., 2023), InstructBLIP (Li et al., 2023), Qwen-VL (Bai et al., 2023)

3.titleCN: 图像生成效率 - 生成速度 (steps/s)
3.descCN: SDXL 在 A100 上生成一张图像所需的 steps/s。标准 SDXL 需要 ~50 steps（fp16）才能生成高质量图像。LCM (Latent Consistency Model) 通过一致性模型将所需 steps 降至 4-8 步，速度提升 3-4 倍。SDXS 通过一步式蒸馏（1 step）实现最高速度 28.4 steps/s，但质量略低于多步方法。
3.descEN: Steps per second for SDXL image generation on A100. Standard SDXL needs ~50 steps (fp16) for high quality. LCM (Latent Consistency Model) reduces to 4-8 steps (3-4x faster). SDXS one-step distillation achieves highest speed 28.4 steps/s, but slightly lower quality than multi-step methods.
3.source: LCM (Luo et al., 2023), SDXS (Shao et al., 2024), SD Turbo (Sauer et al., 2023)

4.descCN: 训练到指定质量所需的 A100 GPU 小时数。OpenCLIP ViT-L/14 在 LAION-400M 上训练需 14.5K GPU hours。SigLIP 使用 Google TPU 集群（等效 256 TPUv3 ≈ 256 A100），在等效计算量下达到更高精度。ALIGN 使用 1.8B 图文对，训练效率最高（8.2 GPU hours/百万图对）。
4.descEN: GPU hours on A100 needed to train to target quality. OpenCLIP ViT-L/14 on LAION-400M = 14.5K GPU hours. SigLIP uses Google TPU cluster (256 TPUv3 ≈ 256 A100). ALIGN (1.8B image-text pairs) has highest training efficiency at 8.2 GPU hours per million image-text pairs.
4.source: OpenCLIP (Cherti et al., 2023), SigLIP (Zhai et al., 2023), ALIGN (Jia et al., 2021)

5.descCN: Flickr30K 图文匹配测试中，图文检索任务（image-to-text 和 text-to-image）的 Recall@1 指标。Recall@1 表示在检索结果中排名第一的就是正确结果的比率。EVA-CLIP ViT-G 通过大规模 EVA 预训练达到 82.1%，领先其他模型。
5.descEN: Recall@1 on Flickr30K for image-to-text and text-to-image retrieval. Recall@1 = the correct result is ranked #1. EVA-CLIP ViT-G leads at 82.1% via large-scale EVA pretraining. Higher = better retrieval matching.
5.source: OpenCLIP (Cherti et al., 2023), EVA-CLIP (Sun et al., 2023)
